creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neil Bradley from comment #3)

Thanks for the confirmation. 

If ever you're inclined to find the relevant commit(s), feel free to add another comment :-)

(Release notes <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.2R/relnotes/>, not intended to be comprehensive, seem to not cover your case.) 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/?h=releng/13.2> tagged release/13.2.0 at <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tag/?h=release/13.2.0>.
